extension.description: Convert shorthand class names like w100 into Tailwind-compatible classes like w-100.
command.convert.title: Tailwind Class Convert: Convert Current File or Selection
command.toggle.title: Tailwind Class Convert: Toggle for Current Workspace
configuration.title: Tailwind Class Convert
configuration.enableMode.description: Controls whether conversion is enabled in the current workspace.
configuration.enableMode.auto: Automatically enable when Tailwind CSS is detected.
configuration.convertOnSave.description: Automatically convert supported classes when saving.
configuration.showStatusBar.description: Show the Tailwind Class Convert switch in the status bar.
configuration.languages.description: Language IDs that Tailwind Class Convert can process.
